input.note: Contract: the `zxs run --json` report exposes audio.beeperEdges as a non-negative integer (dna/product/cli.md CLI-PROD-OUT-RUN-AUDIO-001; dna/product/toolkit-runtime.md RT-PROD-RUN-005; dna/product/recipes-and-assertions.md ASSERT-PROD-BEEPER-001). Executed by the cli fixture runner (authored in R-W4-05) against the REGENERATED @zx-vibes/toolkit, normalized via the cli-snapshot profile. Asserts the field type/shape (integer >= 0), NOT an exact edge count (which is incidental to a program). Flips to covered when the regenerated toolkit passes it.

cases.name: beeper-program
cases.program: a short routine that toggles port 0xFE bit 4 to produce beeper edges
